analysis.name: Zoho Mail
analysis.tagline: Secure & Professional Business Email for your Organization
analysis.value_proposition: Ad-free, privacy-focused business email hosting with custom domain, admin controls, and integrated collaboration tools at competitive pricing.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small to medium businesses and enterprises seeking affordable, privacy-respecting business email with custom domain hosting as an alternative to Google Workspace or Microsoft 365

free_tier.limits: Up to 5 users, 5GB per user, web access only, single domain

tiers.name: Mail Lite
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5GB-10GB/user, email hosting, custom domain, multiple domain hosting, IMAP/POP, mobile apps

tiers.name: Mail Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: 50GB/user, 1TB cloud storage, S/MIME encryption, eDiscovery, email retention, white labeling

tiers.name: Workplace Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Mail + 30GB, Cliq, WorkDrive, Writer/Sheet/Show, Meeting, Connect

tiers.name: Workplace Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: Mail + 100GB, full Workplace suite with advanced features

tiers.name: Forever Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 users, 5GB/user, single custom domain, web access only

pricing.notes: Pricing page content was blocked in extraction; tiers reflect standard Zoho Mail plans known from prior data. Zoho typically offers annual billing discounts (~20%). Regional pricing varies (INR/EUR available). Confirm current prices directly.
